name: auto_cinematic_video_prompt_skill
description: Generates Seedance 2-ready cinematic video prompts for text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, start-frame, start-stop-frame, and multi-shot storyboard workflows.
primary_use_cases: image-to-video prompt generation from 1 to 5 reference images
start frame and stop frame video planning
camera movement and pose transition design
vertical 9:16 and horizontal 16:9 cinematic video prompts
continuity_principles: Preserve identity, wardrobe, hair, makeup, environment, material fidelity, lighting direction, color grade, and cinematic tone.
Camera movement and pose change must be physically plausible.
Start and stop frames must not be near-duplicates unless explicitly requested for micro-motion only.
Storyboard shots must feel like the same scene captured by a professional cinematographer, not separate redesigns.
